scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.prisma:push: npm --prefix backend exec -- prisma db push
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm --prefix backend exec -- prisma migrate dev
